title: just enough craftables
description: adds recipes for normally uncraftable items in a balanced way.
body: adds many recipes for items like, skulls, wither skulls, and more, for example now you can craft saddles, horse armor and nametags. This mod also introduces some alternative recipes, more is going to be added to this mod, stick around for more unexpected recipes! (created by cosmic sorno, and published by noobdahack)
